message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Admin
actor Customer
interface "Games Interface"
interface "Games Input Interface"
interface "Games Controller"
database "Database"

Admin --> Games Interface : CRUD games
Games Interface --> Games Input Interface : Input games info
Games Input Interface --> Games Controller : Send CRUD request to server
Games Controller --> Database : Query request to DB
Database --> Games Controller : Response

alt
  [success case]
    Games Controller --> Games Interface : CRUD successfully
  [fail case]
    Games Controller --> Games Interface : CRUD fail
end

Games Interface --> Admin : Show notification
Customer --> Games Interface : View Game
Games Interface --> Games Controller : FETCH game from server
Games Controller --> Database : Query games
Database --> Games Controller : Games data
Games Controller --> Games Interface : Games data
Games Interface --> Customer : Show all games

@enduml
